race.comment: CHE OLE (8) sound return from the wide draw with a fighting second over 1400m at Hawkesbury. Near her top for this and can go one better from the low draw. STREET FORCE (9) motored late from back in the field with an excellent fourth over 1250m at Newcastle. Looking for this trip now and has top-three claims. HELLFIRE HENRY (5) huge effort at his second race start from the outside draw with a gritty third over 1200m at Goulburn. Fitter now and worth serious consideration over this distance. PRINCE DE VEGA (3) handy gelding close to a Maiden win. Took control early before he was nailed late when second over 1200m at Goulburn. Best figures measure up and will prove hard to run down. CAPTAINTHUNDERBOLT (2) has finished in the minor money at both career starts and stays in the mix from the soft draw.
